headline: Home Improvement Stock Down 40% Gets $14 Million Trim as Growth Slowed Last Quarter
summary: Floor & Decor supplies hard surface flooring and accessories nationwide, serving pros and consumers via a warehouse-format retail model.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Wabtec, AerCap and Air Lease
summary: Wabtec and peers show resilience with dividends and buybacks, even as transport leasing faces inflation, weak freight rates, and supply-chain pressures.
